overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dense forest at night, illuminated only by a flashlight. The footage appears to be from a video game, featuring a narrow dirt trail surrounded by trees and underbrush in low-light conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow forest path, sweeping the flashlight across the trail to navigate the darkness

entered.detail: large tree trunk with rough bark visible on the right side of the path
dense green shrubs and small plants lining the left side of the trail
narrow winding dirt trail covered with patches of grass and leaves
dense overhead tree cover blocking most of the night sky
tall trees visible in the distance beyond the flashlight beam

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest at night. A flashlight illuminates the immediate path ahead, revealing thick tree trunks, leafy underbrush, and an uneven dirt surface while the surrounding woods remain shrouded in darkness. The atmosphere is isolated and tense, with no other characters or vehicles present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a dense, nocturnal forest where a single light source carves a path through oppressive darkness. It begins by steadily advancing along a narrow dirt trail, with a flashlight beam cutting through the gloom to reveal the immediate terrain. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the light flickers across thick tree trunks and tangled leafy underbrush that crowd the edges of the path. The scene maintains a sense of isolation and tension as the uneven dirt surface unfolds beneath the beam, while the surrounding environment remains an impenetrable wall of black.
